creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text: Strangely, I tried building www/firefox on stable/10, from before r410973 was applied, and it builds just fine for me, even the problematic Unified_cpp_protocol_websocket0.cpp file.  I'm unsure what is different in my environment from the original submitter, though.  This is on pretty plain stable/10 r294049, as of 2016-01-21.
